headline: Reese’s Puffs and GloRilla Are Bringing Back the Iconic "Eat ‘Em Up" Rap with New Late-Night Remix
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, June 25, 2026--Reese’s Puffs cereal, the beloved brand with deep ties to music, entertainment and fan-fueled moments, is taking the mic to announce a new partnership with multi-platinum powerhouse GloRilla. With her signature sound, GloRilla is bringing after hours energy and a bold vibe to a remix of the Reese’s Puffs iconic "Eat ’Em Up" rap, dropping at midnight on June 26, via CMG/Interscope Records.

content.title: Reese’s Puffs and GloRilla Are Bringing Back the Iconic "Eat ‘Em Up" Rap with New Late-Night Remix

thumbnail.caption: Reese’s Puffs cereal is turning up the volume on a nostalgic fan-favorite, linking up with GloRilla to release a bold remix of its iconic “Eat ‘Em Up” track.
